risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) component was canceled and IDA grant disbursements remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High at current assessment, indicating significant fragility in the operating environment that threatens project implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_summary: Macroeconomic risks are rated High, reflecting broader economic fragility in Afghanistan that undermines the financial intermediation objectives and institutional capacity for implementation.
